subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath perfumed the world with the fragrant breezes of His Revelation and illumined the hearts of the sincere ones [3.5s]... ...Upon thee be the peace of God, the Possessor of the earth and the Creator of the heavens
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی عطر العالم من نفحات وحیه و نور افئده المخلصین … یا محمد تقی علیک بهائی جنود الله که ناصر امر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
